reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paM1JrSmpSbTVRTm1oRlRUZDVhVFExWkZOTFlXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Ordered Roasted whole bean Kenyan and Ethiopian coffee.
Pros:
Good quality beans.
Reasonably priced

Cons:
5 month old batch roasts (lost freshness post 1month - can feel it)
Darker roasts are only available.

Final Conclusion:
Many Indian roaster have better SOPs and produce better tasting coffee with less premium beans.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your thoughtful feedback. We’re glad you found the quality and pricing of our beans to your liking. Your observations about roast freshness and profiles have been noted and shared with our roasting team. We’re continuously working to refine our processes to ensure every single-origin bean reflects its true character at peak freshness. Insights like yours help us evolve and enhance the coffee experience we aim to deliver.

Please DM us your contact details on Instagram at @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly.
